action.description: Defines alert actions, including action group IDs and optional webhook properties

criteria.description: Specifies alert criteria like category, resource details, and health conditions
criteria.type: list(object({caller: optional(string),category: string,level: optional(string),levels: optional(list(string)),operation_name: optional(string),recommendation_category: optional(string),recommendation_impact: optional(string),recommendation_type: optional(string),resource_group: optional(string),resource_groups: optional(list(string)),resource_id: optional(string),resource_ids: optional(list(string)),resource_provider: optional(string),resource_providers: optional(list(string)),resource_type: optional(string),resource_types: optional(list(string)),status: optional(string),statuses: optional(list(string)),sub_status: optional(string),sub_statuses: optional(list(string)),resource_health: list(object({current: optional(list(string)),previous: optional(list(string)),reason: optional(list(string))})),service_health: list(object({events: optional(list(string)),locations: optional(list(string)),services: optional(list(string))}))}))

description.description: Provides a summary or details about the resource

enabled.description: Indicates whether the resource is active (true) or inactive (false)

name.description: Specifies the unique name for the resource (required)

scopes.description: Lists scope identifiers for the resource (e.g., subscriptions or resource groups)

tags.description: Defines metadata as key-value pairs for organization and management

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts for create, read, update, or delete actions

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
